fields.title: gate fails in prompt-modes-session-start tests unrelated to sandbox notice fix
fields.notes: Observed while running npm run gate in extensions/tau after sandbox change work. Failing tests: test/prompt-modes-session-start.test.ts (3 failures): keeps last used mode when /new session has no persisted mode, prefers session persisted mode over previous in-memory mode, does not override model/thinking in non-interactive mode.
